name: Pesto-Stuffed Olives
recipeIngredient: 1 cup small curd cottage cheese (or ricotta)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pesto sauce and cottage cheese (or ricotta) in a food processor.
2. Process until smooth.
3. Cut a thin slice from each olive to stand upright.
4. Spoon the pesto mixture into a pastry bag fitted with a 1/4-inch tip.
5. Pipe the filling into the olives.
6. Arrange the stuffed olives on a serving platter.
7. Serve slightly chilled or at room temperature.
